title: Core Sense [Xin Jue] Episode 4 Subbed
description: "Xin Jue" is an oriental-themed animation of supernatural combat. In a modern city called "Yun City", "Xian Qisi" which controls the power of the world peacekeeping element. A major change ten years ago caused the "Xianqi Division" to gradually weaken. Yun City Leader Li Zunyuan began using "Bnti Stone" to transform his body. Yun City's fragmented "Xianqi Division" is in crisis. Reporter Yue Juntian was inadvertently involved in a conspiracy during the interview, and this conspiracy is actually just the beginning of a bigger storm...
